# stripe_terminal_configuration (Resource)

A Configurations object represents how features should be configured for terminal readers.
For information about how to use it, see the [Terminal configurations documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/terminal/fleet/configurations-overview).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `bbpos_wisepad3` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--bbpos_wisepad3))
- `bbpos_wisepos_e` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--bbpos_wisepos_e))
- `cellular` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cellular))
- `name` (String) String indicating the name of the Configuration object, set by the user
- `offline` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--offline))
- `reboot_window` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--reboot_window))
- `stripe_s700` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stripe_s700))
- `stripe_s710` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--stripe_s710))
- `tipping` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tipping))
- `verifone_m425` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--verifone_m425))
- `verifone_p400` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--verifone_p400))
- `verifone_p630` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--verifone_p630))
- `verifone_ux700` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--verifone_ux700))
- `verifone_v660p` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--verifone_v660p))
- `wifi` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--wifi))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the object.
- `is_account_default` (Boolean) Whether this Configuration is the default for your account
- `livemode` (Boolean) If the object exists in live mode, the value is `true`. If the object exists in test mode, the value is `false`.
- `object` (String) String representing the object's type. Objects of the same type share the same value.

<a id="nestedatt--bbpos_wisepad3"></a>
### Nested Schema for `bbpos_wisepad3`

Optional:

- `splashscreen` (String) A File ID representing an image to display on the reader


<a id="nestedatt--bbpos_wisepos_e"></a>
### Nested Schema for `bbpos_wisepos_e`

Optional:

- `splashscreen` (String) A File ID representing an image to display on the reader


<a id="nestedatt--cellular"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cellular`

Required:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether a cellular-capable reader can connect to the internet over cellular.


<a id="nestedatt--offline"></a>
### Nested Schema for `offline`

Required:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Determines whether to allow transactions to be collected while reader is offline. Defaults to false.


<a id="nestedatt--reboot_window"></a>
### Nested Schema for `reboot_window`

Required:

- `end_hour` (Number) Integer between 0 to 23 that represents the end hour of the reboot time window. The value must be different than the start_hour.
- `start_hour` (Number) Integer between 0 to 23 that represents the start hour of the reboot time window.


<a id="nestedatt--stripe_s700"></a>
### Nested Schema for `stripe_s700`

Optional:

- `splashscreen` (String) A File ID representing an image to display on the reader


<a id="nestedatt--stripe_s710"></a>
### Nested Schema for `stripe_s710`

Optional:

- `splashscreen` (String) A File ID representing an image to display on the reader

<a id="nestedatt--tipping--aed"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tipping.aed`

Optional:

- `fixed_amounts` (List of Number) Fixed amounts displayed when collecting a tip
- `percentages` (List of Number) Percentages displayed when collecting a tip
- `smart_tip_threshold` (Number) Below this amount, fixed amounts will be displayed; above it, percentages will be displayed

<a id="nestedatt--wifi"></a>
### Nested Schema for `wifi`

Required:

- `type` (String) Security type of the WiFi network. The hash with the corresponding name contains the credentials for this security type.

Optional:

- `enterprise_eap_peap` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--wifi--enterprise_eap_peap))
- `enterprise_eap_tls` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--wifi--enterprise_eap_tls))
- `personal_psk` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--wifi--personal_psk))

<a id="nestedatt--wifi--enterprise_eap_peap"></a>
### Nested Schema for `wifi.enterprise_eap_peap`

Required:

- `password` (String) Password for connecting to the WiFi network
- `ssid` (String) Name of the WiFi network
- `username` (String) Username for connecting to the WiFi network

Optional:

- `ca_certificate_file` (String) A File ID representing a PEM file containing the server certificate


<a id="nestedatt--wifi--enterprise_eap_tls"></a>
### Nested Schema for `wifi.enterprise_eap_tls`

Required:

- `client_certificate_file` (String) A File ID representing a PEM file containing the client certificate
- `private_key_file` (String) A File ID representing a PEM file containing the client RSA private key
- `ssid` (String) Name of the WiFi network

Optional:

- `ca_certificate_file` (String) A File ID representing a PEM file containing the server certificate
- `private_key_file_password` (String) Password for the private key file


<a id="nestedatt--wifi--personal_psk"></a>
### Nested Schema for `wifi.personal_psk`

Required:

- `password` (String) Password for connecting to the WiFi network
- `ssid` (String) Name of the WiFi network
